title: Deferred Downpayment Scheme (DDS)
text:
Deferred Downpayment Scheme (DDS) - SupportGoWhere
Deferred Downpayment Scheme (DDS)
Share link
Provides seniors the option to defer downpayment when rightsizing to a new flat.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible seniors can defer downpayment until key collection
Pay only stamp duty and legal fees at Agreement for Lease signing
Collapse all sections
About this support

Eligible seniors can defer downpayment until key collection when rightsizing to a new flat

Pay only stamp duty and legal fees when signing the Agreement for Lease, within 9 months after booking a flat

Full payment of the flat's purchase price is deferred until the flat is ready for key collection

Who is this for?

Flat buyers aged 55 and above at the time of HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter application

Have not sold (or completed the sale of) their existing flat at the time of HFE letter application

Booked an uncompleted 3-room or smaller flat in any HDB sales exercise

How to apply?

Buyers will be informed during the flat booking appointment if they are eligible.

Where can I find help?

View more information

HDB Hotline: 6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 06 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
